title: sphaeropteris setifera
intro: Sphaeropteris setifera, commonly known as the tree fern, is a species of plant in the family Marattiaceae. It is a type of perennial fern that is native to tropical and subtropical regions, particularly in Southeast Asia and the Pacific Islands. The health benefits of Sphaeropteris setifera include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce pain and inflammation, and protect against cell damage and oxidative stress. The bioactive constituents of this plant include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which contribute to its therapeutic actions, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral effects.

side_effects: Sphaeropteris setifera can have side effects if used improperly, such as inducing allergic reactions, including hives, itching, and difficulty breathing in some individuals.
